=== bd1998-06-26-Roskilde.txt

===================
Bob Dylan
1998-06-26
Orange Stage  
Dyrskuepladsen, Roskilde, Denmark


Taper: Identity withheld.

Source: Audio disks (said to be low-generation) > (dBpowerAMP set
to compression level 6) flac. (Thanks, SF!)

Fingerprint: At beginning of "I Shall be Released" (d2, t3) someone
says twice, in succession, "real deal".

I did not see a LB number for this date.

Disk One

Gotta Serve Somebody 
If Not For You 
Cold Irons Bound 
You Ain't Goin' Nowhere 
Silvio 
Cocaine Blues (acoustic w band) 
It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic w band) 
Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band) 

Disk Two

Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic w band) 
Ballad Of A Thin Man 
I Shall Be Released 
Highway 61 Revisited 
Love Sick 
Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 
Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic w band)
